indicators.name: VIX
indicators.insight: Volatility remains contained, which supports continuation setups.

indicators.name: US 10Y Yield
indicators.insight: Rates are elevated but not disorderly, reducing shock risk for quality growth.

indicators.name: Inflation Trend
indicators.insight: Disinflation favors multiple expansion for durable growth names.

indicators.name: Breadth
indicators.insight: Leadership is concentrated, so mirror signals are stronger in quality names than in broad cyclicals.

regime_transitions.note: Large-cap leadership regained control after softer inflation expectations.
Narrative concentration returned to infrastructure and platform winners.
